news.headline: Dogecoin, WIF, and other memecoins lead the $1.7 billion crypto liquidations with significant double-digit losses.
news.summary: The value of memecoins has dropped significantly compared to the overall cryptocurrency market, with double-digit daily losses exceeding those seen in Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH).

news.headline: Advyzon partners with iCapital to improve alts capabilities, linking data & fund activity integration for advisors.
news.summary: A tech platform for financial advisors, Advyzon, has revealed a new integration with iCapital, a global fintech platform in the wealth and asset management sector. The collaboration involves incorporating data and fund activity from iCapital's alternative investment strategies into Advyzon's portfolio management solution. This partnership strives to enhance services provided by both companies and offer a wider range of investment opportunities to clients.

news.headline: Infinix launches vibrant colors for HOT 50 Series, inspiring individuality. Theme: "NEW YEAR, NEW HOT, NEW LUCK."
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 10, 2024, Infinix, a tech brand aimed at young consumers, is revamping its HOT 50 Series with fresh, vibrant colors to spark individuality and positivity for the upcoming year. The theme "NEW YEAR, NEW HOT, NEW LUCK" encapsulates the brand's vision for the series, introducing exciting changes ahead.

news.headline: SucceedSmart wins four awards in technology, including Gold in Unique Talent Acquisition Technology, after three Bronze in 2023.
news.summary: A leadership hiring platform driven by AI technology showed enhanced award performance by securing four prestigious awards in the 2023 program. Based in Los Altos, California, SucceedSmart has been recognized for its excellence, surpassing its previous achievement of three Bronze Awards. The platform, known for its advanced AI-led approach to leadership recruitment, continues to gain recognition within the industry. The awards were received from the Brandon Hall Group Excellence program, highlighting the platform's exceptional contributions to the field.

news.headline: Benzinga partners with Tradesk for real-time news integration. Expansion into the U.S. with Fiduciary Securities.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Benzinga, the top financial news provider in North America, revealed its ongoing collaboration with Hong Kong's Fiduciary Securities as the company enters the U.S. market with a user-friendly trading platform. This partnership aims to combine Benzinga's extensive financial insights with Fiduciary Securities' innovative platform to offer American investors a unique trading experience. This move signifies Benzinga's commitment to providing its audience with cutting-edge tools and resources to navigate the financial markets successfully.

news.headline: Global liver metastasis treatment market to reach US$ 3.3 billion by 2034, growing at 6.5% CAGR. Rising demand for advanced therapies driving growth. Minimally invasive treatments like TACE, RFA, and immunotherapies gaining popularity. Need for new therapeutic methods due to rising cancer rates.
news.summary: The global liver metastasis treatment market is projected to reach US$1,767.9 million in 2024, with a forecasted growth rate of 6.5% from 2024 to 2034. The rising demand for advanced treatment modalities aimed at enhancing patient prognosis, driven by increasing incidences of primary cancers like colorectal and breast cancer, is spurring market growth. The complexity associated with liver metastases has led to the development of systemic and localized therapies such as TACE, RFA, and immunotherapies to extend patient survival. The market is shifting towards personalized and minimally invasive treatments like immunotherapy and targeted therapy, showing a move towards treating metastatic cancer at a molecular level for better outcomes. With diseases like colorectal, breast, and lung cancer being more prevalent in liver metastasis cases, the demand for innovative therapeutic methods that cause minimal peripheral tissue damage is increasing. Minimally invasive treatments like TACE, RFA, and microwave ablation are gaining popularity due to shorter recovery times and fewer complications, especially benefiting patients ineligible for invasive surgery. The market is expected to expand further, driven by increasing adoption of these techniques in both high-income and emerging markets.

news.headline: uniQure and FDA agree on using data from Phase I/II studies for Accelerated Approval of AMT-130 in Huntington’s Disease.
news.summary: The FDA in the United States has approved the use of data from Phase I/II studies compared to a natural history external control as the main foundation for submitting a Biologics License Application (BLA) for Accelerated Approval. This decision allows for faster approval processes, potentially speeding up the availability of new treatments. This marks a significant development in the regulatory landscape, offering a pathway for quicker approval of promising therapies.

news.headline: RealSelf's report finds in 2024, despite a GLP-1 boom, consumers are investing in body contouring treatments. Insights from 55 million visits.
news.summary: In New York, RealSelf, the leading online platform for individuals researching cosmetic procedures and practitioners, has released its first Real Talk report. This study delves into the key trends influencing the worldwide aesthetics industry in 2024. Drawing from data and analysis of consumer interactions on RealSelf, which totaled over 55 million visits last year, the report highlights significant changes occurring in the realm of aesthetics. The findings provide a comprehensive overview of the evolving landscape in the cosmetic treatment sector.

news.headline: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. (NYSE: HASI) announces reopening of $300 million of 6.375% green senior unsecured notes due 2034.
news.summary: Annapolis, MD - HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. ("HASI"), a prominent climate solutions investor listed on NYSE as HASI, revealed on December 9, 2024 that it has priced a private offering. The offering consists of $300 million in aggregate principal amount of 6.375% green senior unsecured notes due 2034, known as the "Notes." These Notes, an addition to the existing class, will align with the company's current 6.375% green senior unsecured notes due 2034.

news.headline: Max Stock Ltd. (TASE: MAXO) to present at 2025 ICR Conference on Jan 13, 2025, 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: In Caesarea, Israel, on December 10, 2024, Max Stock Limited (TASE: MAXO) revealed plans to participate in the upcoming 2025 ICR Conference. Set for Monday, January 13, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time or 6:00 p.m. Israel Time, the Company will deliver a presentation during the event.

news.headline: SUANNUTRA launches SuanBlend™ platform for supplement concept creation, catering to customers for novel products.
news.summary: In recent news, on December 10, 2024, in Madrid, a prominent nutraceutical company, SUANNUTRA, S.L., has introduced a cutting-edge digital tool known as SuanBlend™. This platform aims to assist customers in crafting unique products tailored to their needs. This innovative approach signifies the company's commitment to advancing product development.

news.headline: ProPetro unveils ProPWRSM, new power generation unit.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States saw a decline to 4.2% in the month of September. This drop marks a decrease of 0.4% from the previous month, with 194,000 jobs being added to the economy. The report also indicates a rise in the labor force participation rate to 61.8%. These numbers suggest a positive trend in the job market, with more individuals finding employment opportunities. However, it is important to note that challenges still exist, particularly in certain sectors that continue to feel the impacts of the ongoing pandemic. Overall, the data reflects a promising outlook for the country's economic recovery.

news.headline: ST Engineering iDirect has released breakthrough tech for GEO/NGSO tracking and switching on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: An innovative satellite communication technology is being pioneered to facilitate essential GEO/NGSO tracking and switching in HERNDON, Va. On December 10, 2024, ST Engineering iDirect, a prominent player in satellite communications, introduced and is currently evaluating a novel technology aimed at enhancing tracking and switching capabilities.

news.headline: Dating.com users trend: 81% feel as happy receiving virtual gifts as physical ones. New York, Dec. 2024.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Global online communication platform, Dating.com, a part of Social Discovery Group, found that 81% of users reported feeling equally happy when receiving a virtual gift compared to a physical one. The survey, conducted in New York on December 10, 2024, highlights the positive impact of virtual gifts on user satisfaction. This data emphasizes the growing popularity of digital gifts in online communication, showcasing how users are effectively expressing themselves through this platform.

news.headline: Syntara reports positive Phase 2 interim data for SNT-5505 in myelofibrosis trial.
news.summary: Syntara Limited (ASX:SNT) in Sydney shared encouraging news on Dec. 10, 2024, reporting positive interim findings from their Phase 2 clinical study. The trial involves assessing the effectiveness of SNT-5505 at a dosage of 200 mg twice a day, in conjunction with ruxolitinib (RUX), for treating...

news.headline: Broadridge ranked highest in Market Impact and as Star Performer in Wealth Management Products by Everest Group PEAK Matrix®.
news.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR), a prominent global Fintech leader, was recently recognized for its market success and technological capabilities in the Everest Group PEAK Matrix®. The report focuses on evaluating companies based on performance, experiences, ability, and knowledge. This recognition underscores Broadridge's strong position in the market, showcasing its expertise and innovation in the fintech industry. The report was released on December 10, 2024, highlighting Broadridge's impressive performance and overall capability in the technology sector.

news.headline: New Gianna Lullume Smart Infant Sleep Device by Kerchan Group launched on Kickstarter on Dec. 10, 2024. Features cutting-edge technology.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Hong Kong, the Gianna Lullume Smart Infant Sleep Device, created by Kerchan Group, was introduced on Kickstarter. This advanced infant sleep aid features state-of-the-art technology and an easy-to-use interface. The device aims to provide a solution for better sleep for infants and has garnered attention for its innovative design.

news.headline: J.M. Smucker Co. to showcase transformed portfolio and capabilities for sustainable growth at 2024 Investor Day.
news.summary: In Orville, Ohio on December 10, 2024, The J.M. Smucker Co. will showcase its readiness for enduring growth at the 2024 Investor Day. The company, listed as SJM on NYSE, will spotlight its strategic evolution and exceptional strengths that have paved the way for sustained progress. The event aims to demonstrate how the company, over the preceding years, has positioned itself for long-term growth and success.

news.headline: Zubie partners with Ford Pro for fleet management, expanding services to more businesses with data-driven solutions.
news.summary: In Bloomington, Minnesota on December 10, 2024, Zubie, a prominent provider of fleet telematics solutions, revealed a new partnership with Ford Pro™, the commercial division of Ford Motor Company. This collaboration aims to expand the availability of cutting-edge data-driven fleet management tools to a wider array of businesses.

news.headline: Indian Hill Exempted Village School District partners with Varsity Tutors for Schools to offer live and on-demand tutoring to all students.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, the Indian Hill Exempted Village School District revealed a new collaboration with Varsity Tutors for Schools, a subsidiary of Nerdy (NYSE: NRDY), the prominent platform for live online tutoring. This partnership will grant all students in the District access to the Varsity Tutors for Schools platform. The initiative guarantees that all students, teachers, and parents will have access to a diverse range of educational resources for future school years. The comprehensive platform includes interactive study materials and support.

news.headline: StorPool earns 85% 5-Star Gartner rating in 2024, highest among competitors in Primary Storage Platform.
news.summary: In Sofia, Bulgaria, StorPool Storage, a top provider of primary data storage solutions, has been recognized in the Gartner Peer Insights Customers' Choice 2024 program. The company received exclusively 4- and 5-Star reviews, excelling in areas such as product capabilities, evaluation processes, integration, deployment, and customer service. Over the last year, StorPool attained an impressive 85% rate of 5-Star ratings, which stands out as one of the highest among competing vendors in the Primary Storage Platform sector.

news.headline: GlobalMeet introduces Live Studio Control Room for improved virtual event production in Phoenix.
news.summary: In Phoenix, GlobalMeet has introduced a new Live Studio Control Room to elevate virtual event production. The cutting-edge facility aims to enhance the quality of virtual events and provide superior production capabilities. This development is part of the company's commitment to improving virtual event experiences for users.

news.headline: ICE introduces Long EU Bond Index futures, referencing ICE 8-13 Year EU Index (Ticker: G0EU8T13), offering risk management for EU sovereign debt exposure.
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), a prominent global technology and data provider, has introduced the Long European Union (EU) Bond Index futures. This new product, which began trading recently, is a cash-settled futures contract tied to the ICE 8-13 Year European Union Index (Ticker: G0EU8T13). This index monitors the performance of extended-period debt released by the EU. The launch aims to offer a valuable tool for handling exposure to EU sovereign debt within the market.

news.headline: ASBL President writes open letter to SBA Administrator nominee Kelly Loeffler advocating for fair contracts for small businesses.
news.summary: Founded in 2004 in Petaluma, California, the American Small Business League (ASBL) advocates for small businesses to receive a fair share of prime contracts' total value. ASBL President Lloyd Chapman recently wrote an open letter to Kelly Loeffler, congratulating her on her nomination as the Small Business Administration administrator. With over 99% of American businesses being classified as small, the ASBL emphasizes the importance of supporting small businesses for a thriving economy.

news.headline: Sable Resources identifies new targets in Copper Queen Project, British Columbia. (Number of targets not provided)
news.summary: Sable Resources Ltd., a mining company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, shared new findings on Dec. 10, 2024. The company, listed on the TSXV as SAE and OTCQB as SBLRF, disclosed recent results from multiple mineralized zones at its Copper Queen Project in west-central British Columbia. The project, entirely owned by Sable, continues to show promising mineral potential.

news.headline: Lumina Gold extends EIPA with Ecuador Gov, boosting partnership. TSXV: LUM, OTCQB: LMGDF. (Date: Dec. 10, 2024)
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 10, 2024, Lumina Gold Corp. (TSXV: LUM) (OTCQB: LMGDF) revealed the Government of Ecuador's Strategic Committee for the Promotion and Attraction passed a resolution. The specifics of the resolution were not disclosed. Lumina Gold Corp. operates as "Lumina" in this context.

news.headline: Gavan Technologies secures $8M to produce plant-based Fatrix® fat in new European facility.
news.summary: A start-up company is building a new plant in Europe to manufacture its plant-based Fatrix® fat. The company, Gavan Technologies, Ltd., based in Caesarea, Israel, has recently secured $8 million in A-round funding. This financial backing will support the expansion of commercial production.

news.headline: PricingDirect and Aumni partner to offer independent valuations for private equity securities under JPMorgan Chase & Co, enhancing transparency.
news.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s subsidiaries, PricingDirect, Inc. and Aumni, Inc., have joined forces in a strategic partnership to deliver independent valuations of private equity securities. This collaboration aims to offer investors increased transparency and efficiency in the valuation process. By combining the unique capabilities of both entities, the partnership seeks to provide a comprehensive solution for investors. This move is part of JPMorgan's ongoing efforts to enhance its services and facilitate informed decision-making for its clients. This initiative underscores JPMorgan's commitment to innovation and client-focused solutions.

news.headline: PrimeSource Brands strengthens platform with acquisition of Harney Hardware in 2024.
news.summary: A recent acquisition has bolstered the specialty branded building products division in Irving, Texas, Santa Monica, and Tampa. On December 10, 2024, PrimeSource Brands, a leading North American supplier of specialty branded residential building products supported by Clearlake, made a strategic move to enhance its platform. This acquisition is expected to significantly strengthen their market position with a focus on expanding their product line.

news.headline: Recurrent Energy signs 10-year PPA for 300 MW with major US tech company in Spain..RichTextBox: Canadian Solar's subsidiary in solar development.
news.summary: In Kitchener, Ontario, on December 10, 2024, Recurrent Energy, a subsidiary of Canadian Solar Inc. (NASDAQ: CSIQ), revealed the signing of a 10-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA). Canadian Solar is a leading global company in solar and energy storage development, ownership, and operation.

news.headline: CES Power acquires Base Craft, a provider of specialty services for motion picture industry, to form CES Studio Services Division.
news.summary: A company specializing in event infrastructure, CES Power LLC, revealed their acquisition of Base Craft, LLC, on December 10, 2024. This move will establish a foundation for CES's newly formed CES Studio Services division. This acquisition marks CES's expansion within the industry. The transaction positions CES as a prominent player in the live events infrastructure sector.

news.headline: Bask Health positioned to meet rising demand for GLP-1 meds in $13.6 billion industry by 2028.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, it was reported that there is a surge in the demand for GLP-1 medications. Studies suggest that the market for these medications is expected to hit $13.6 billion worldwide by 2028 (Research and Markets). Bask Health is strategically positioned to capitalize on this growing demand with its patient-centric approach and comprehensive offerings.

news.headline: Auguria launches new security platform at Black Hat Europe allowing integration with SentinelOne, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks, and Microsoft logs.
news.summary: Auguria, Inc., a tech company known for its innovative AI-powered security operations, has recently announced that its advanced 'data pipeline with a brain' is now capable of seamless integration with leading cybersecurity platforms. This includes SentinelOne, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks, and Microsoft Windows Event Logs. This integration will enable users to generate richer security insights by combining the capabilities of these platforms with Auguria's technology. The announcement was made at Black Hat Europe, a prestigious cybersecurity event held in London on December 10, 2024. This development signifies a significant step forward in enhancing cybersecurity measures for businesses and organizations.

news.headline: RFOptic launches RFoF Ultra for 12GHz+, with excellent price-performance, ideal for compact configurations.
news.summary: The RFoF Ultra solution, known for its compact design, offers outstanding value with a strong price-performance ratio. It is ideal for both standalone use and as part of subsystem configurations, especially in cases where maintaining low size, weight, and power consumption is essential. This makes it a favorable choice compared to RFoF HSFDR for deployment in PARLIN, N.J. The information was released on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: AI software Preferabli partners with Albertsons to revolutionize personalized wine discovery in grocery retail.
news.summary: Exciting news in the grocery retail industry as Preferabli, a top AI-driven product discovery and recommendation software for wine, spirits, and food, has forged a strategic partnership in New York on December 10, 2024. This collaboration aims to revolutionize personalized wine discovery for consumers. This partnership will impact the retail sector significantly by offering advanced technology and tailored recommendations. It is set to enhance the shopping experience and boost customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Leyline Renewable Capital secures $140 million in follow-on funding from Keystone National Group and a public university foundation.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, on December 10, 2024, Leyline Renewable Capital (Leyline), a prominent provider of debt capital for renewable energy developers, revealed securing $140 million in capital from Keystone National Group (Keystone) and a significant public entity.

news.headline: SurplusGLOBAL to showcase AI-based 'SemiMarket' & legacy equipment solutions at SEMICON JAPAN 2024 with 1,182 companies present.
news.summary: SurplusGLOBAL is set to showcase its products at SEMICON JAPAN 2024, happening from December 11 to 13 at Tokyo Big Sight, Japan. This exhibition will see participation from a total of 1,182 companies worldwide.

news.headline: TPG Awards announce winners in various categories including Chase Sapphire, American Express, Marriott Bonvoy, JetBlue, Alaska, Carnival; NYC, Dec. 2024.
news.summary: Introducing a lineup of top players in the travel industry who are revolutionizing travel experiences, offering unparalleled benefits to customers at every stage of their journey. Chase Sapphire, American Express, Marriott Bonvoy, JetBlue, Alaska, Carnival Cruise Line and others are leading the way in transforming the way people travel. These companies are making a significant impact on the travel sector by providing innovative credit cards, airline services, hotel accommodations, cruise experiences, exclusive lounges, and rewarding loyalty programs. This game-changing trend is reshaping the travel landscape, providing travelers with new and exciting options. The developments are expected to bring about a shift in how people plan and enjoy their vacations, offering enhanced possibilities and rewards for travelers.

news.headline: USU rated as top in 2024 SPARK Matrix™ for Software Asset Management Tools by QKS Group, excelling in tech & customer experience.
news.summary: QKS Group's SPARK Matrix™ evaluates and ranks top Software Asset Management (SAM) Tools vendors. USU stands out with high ratings for technology and customer experience management in the competitive analysis. They excelled in technology excellence and received strong ratings in various parameters as per the SPARK Matrix™.

news.headline: TruArc Partners invests in DMI Personal Care, combining with Trademark Cosmetics for a national presence.
news.summary: In New York, TruArc Partners, a private equity firm, has made an investment in DMI Personal Care along with President Douglas Sylva and COO Elaine Balady. DMI will merge with Trademark Cosmetics, a company in TruArc's portfolio on the West Coast, creating a national presence. This partnership will result in strategically-positioned facilities on both the east and west coasts to assist in customer expansion and offer backup support.

news.headline: Yelp launches 20+ AI-powered features for better user & business experience, including Review Insights & personalized feed.
news.summary: A popular company in San Francisco, Yelp Inc. (NYSE: YELP), known for connecting individuals with local businesses, has unveiled over 20 new updates as part of its end-of-year product release. These updates are aimed at improving the user experience for customers and business owners alike. The latest release showcases AI-powered elements like Review Insights, which reveal reviewer opinions on popular subjects, a customized home feed containing additional user-generated content, and improvements to Yelp Assis.

news.headline: PENTAX Medical received US FDA 510(k) clearance for new i20c video endoscope models.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Montvale, New Jersey, PENTAX Medical, a division of HOYA Group, announced that they have received clearance from the US FDA through the 510(k) process for the latest models in their PENTAX Medical i20c Video Endoscope Series. The new models include the PENTAX Medical Video Colonoscope EC34-i20cL and the PENTAX Medical Video Upper GI Scope EG27-i20c. This clearance allows the company to market and distribute these advanced medical devices in the United States. The approval signifies a significant milestone for PENTAX Medical, showcasing their commitment to providing innovative solutions in the medical field.

news.headline: Vince Holding Corp. (NYSE: VNCE) reports Q3 2024 results with significant gross margin expansion and improved profitability. CEO pleased with progress.
news.summary: In New York, Vince Holding Corp. (NYSE: VNCE), a leading global contemporary retailer, shared its financial performance for the third quarter ending on November 2, 2024. Interim CEO David Stefko highlighted the positive outcomes driven by the company's emphasis on strengthening its full-price business and implementing the Transformation Plan. Notable achievements included notable gross margin growth and enhanced profitability.

news.headline: Bio-Techne launches ESR1 mutation monitoring assay, to be showcased at San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium.
news.summary: Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) has revealed that Asuragen, one of its brands, will introduce a new assay focused on ESR1 mutation monitoring at the San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium on December 10, 2024. This highly sensitive assay aims to detect mutations in the ESR1 gene.

news.headline: Golden Arrow completes Phase 2 drilling at San Pietro Project in Chile. Engages consultants for resource estimate. TSX-V: GRG, FSE: G6A, OTCQB: GARWF. Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Golden Arrow Resources Corporation announced positive news on multiple stock exchanges, with their listings as follows: TSX Venture Exchange (TSX-V) under ticker symbol GRG, Frankfurt Stock Exchange (FSE) under ticker symbol G6A, and OTCQB Venture Market (OTCQB) under ticker symbol GARWF. The company, based in Vancouver, BC, shared exciting updates regarding their progress.

news.headline: Park Place acquired 15 acres of land in Dallas from Raytheon on Dec 4, 2024. Plans for a Porsche dealership underway.
news.summary: Park Place Dealerships, a division of Asbury Automotive Group, Inc., announced the completion of acquiring 15 acres of land from Raytheon in Dallas, Texas, on December 4, 2024. This acquisition marks the future development of a top-notch Porsche dealership on the purchased property, aligning with Park Place's reputation for exceptional customer service. The upcoming dealership is anticipated to offer clients the renowned luxury experience associated with both Park Place and Porsche. Demolition of existing structures on the site is slated to commence in early 2025.

news.headline: New 2025 Toyota 4Runner offers up to 326 horsepower, 465 lb.-ft. torque, Trailhunter and Platinum grades available.
news.summary: The i-FORCE powertrain boasts a maximum of 278 horsepower and 317 lb.-ft. of torque, while the i-FORCE MAX offers up to 326 horsepower and 465 lb.-ft. of torque. The vehicle includes a standard power rear window and an optional hands-free power liftgate. It introduces the first-ever Trailhunter and Platinum grades, providing customers with more choices.

news.headline: Bybit crypto exchange celebrates 6th anniversary at Taipei Blockchain Week 2024, supports L1 ecosystems.
news.summary: Celebrating its 6th anniversary at Taipei Blockchain Week 2024, Bybit, the second-largest crypto exchange globally based on trading volume, emphasizes its commitment to advancing Web3 innovation. The event underscores Bybit's dedication to ecosystem development and features Bybit Web3 as a prominent highlight.

news.headline: CITGO Lemont Refinery thanks 44 local partners at annual event. Collaboration efforts praised for 2024.
news.summary: In Lemont, Illinois on December 10, 2024, the CITGO Lemont Refinery hosted its yearly Partnership Breakfast to recognize and thank 44 local community partner organizations for their joint efforts in 2024. CITGO and its partners have collaborated throughout the year on various initiatives...

news.headline: Class 1 Nickel completes private placement, issuing 5.5 million shares at $0.30/share, raising $1.65 million.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Class 1 Nickel and Technologies Ltd. disclosed that they have finished a non-brokered private placement known as the “Private Placement.” In this placement, they have released a total of 5,500,000 "flow-through" common shares, referred to as the "Shares," each priced at $0.30. This move has allowed the company to accumulate gross earnings amounting to $1,650,000.
